mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, community_org_id, complex_org_id, room_no, emergency_contact, emergency_phone, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted, version FROM biz_resident_profile WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO biz_resident_profile ( user_id, community_org_id, complex_org_id, room_no, emergency_contact, emergency_phone, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted, version ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{communityOrgId}, #{complexOrgId}, #{roomNo}, #{emergencyContact}, #{emergencyPhone}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW(), 0, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_resident_profile SET community_org_id = #{communityOrgId}, complex_org_id = #{complexOrgId}, room_no = #{roomNo}, emergency_contact = #{emergencyContact}, emergency_phone = #{emergencyPhone}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
